author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Kevin Warsh sworn in as chair of the Federal Reserve
President Trump’s nominee Kevin Warsh was sworn in as chair of the Federal Reserve on Friday, vowing to lead the organization with “energy and purpose.” 
 
“Our mandate at the Fed is to promote price stability and maximum employment. When we pursue those aims ...  inflation can be lower, growth stronger, real take-home pay higher, and America can be more prosperous.”

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Stephen Colbert signs off as Paul McCartney helps close ‘The Late Show’
Stephen Colbert signed off from “The Late Show” with one final star-studded night at the Ed Sullivan Theater. Paul McCartney joined Colbert for the finale, returning to the same stage where The Beatles made television history more than 60 years ago. The episode featured celebrity cameos, jokes about Colbert’s “final guest,” and ended with McCartney and Colbert turning off the theater lights together, closing out a late-night TV era.
